scope: Audit only. No live curriculum or behavior changes.

cards.title: Benefits Worth Taking Seriously
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep current checkpoint; it targets hype well.
cards.badgeConnection: Shows model literacy can acknowledge real benefits without utopian belief.
cards.notes: Keep evidence tiers. Upgrade visual/interaction to demonstrated, plausible, speculative benefit sorting.

cards.title: Human-Centered AI
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep current checkpoint; add scenario interaction before it.
cards.badgeConnection: Gives the one badge its dignity, accountability, and common-good frame.
cards.notes: Copy is strong but risks sounding slogan-like without a concrete accountability scenario.

cards.title: Better AI Is a Choice
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep current checkpoint; organize levers visually.
cards.badgeConnection: Turns model literacy into agency without pretending fixes are easy.
cards.notes: Good scope, but list-heavy. Needs lever categories and careful source boundaries.

cards.title: Effective Prompting from Model Literacy
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep current checkpoint; it cleanly tests context not weights.
cards.badgeConnection: Makes model literacy immediately practical while preserving the inference boundary.
cards.notes: Strong card. Upgrade context tray into an actual prompt-builder interaction.

cards.title: Model Literate Synthesis
cards.checkpointRecommendation: Keep current checkpoint but add a full-chain synthesis interaction.
cards.badgeConnection: This is the badge capstone and should prove the learner can connect mechanics and judgment.
cards.notes: Needs explicit full prompt-to-response chain including token IDs, embeddings, hidden states, logits, softmax, sampling, context, RAG, grounding, hallucination, costs, benefits, and accountability.

verification.build: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning
verification.buildPages: passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning

screenshots.captureMethod: Temporary headless Chrome profiles via CDP; no user progress changed.

badgeRecommendation: Keep one badge only: Prompt Life: Model Literate.
nextImplementationPriority: Upgrade visual aids and tiny interactions without adding cards or changing progress rules.
